programmes.show_description: All-Stars: Dead Weight. One camp enters the lion's den to hunt for big game. The other team bands together for a group hunt and ends up finding a dangerous, unexpected food source. S3, Ep5
All-Stars: Burn Notice. A devastating injury and a vicious storm that destroys the survivalists' food supply threatens to tear apart the newly-merged camp. S3, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Barnesville House. The guys tackle Ohio's snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house. Back in the shop, Tay devises a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table. S10, Ep5
Return To Barnesville. The team take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio. A return client has an idea for a dining table set made from rusted baskets. S10, Ep6
Truce Or Consequences - Part 1. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep11
Truce Or Consequences - Part 2. Shawn and Kris attempt to settle their feud for good. In the hopes of jump-starting his season, Zeke embarks on a marathon suction dredging campaign. S11, Ep12
The Veterans. Paul Mackie's team have just six days to help a team of ex-servicemen become skilled mobile goldminers and reach their dream of funding a veteran's charity. S1, Ep4
Wild Dingo Territory. Julia's first customer discovers an eastern brown snake while gardening. Plus, Julia and John race to remove a python from a retirement home. S1, Ep7
Breaking 'em In. On the Kodiak and the Wizard the greenhorns are finding out how hard crabbing really is. And on Northwestern, skipper Sig is battling his brother as well as the seas. S6, Ep2
Sea Tested. It's the third week of hunting King crab and Skipper Phil and Skipper Sig's experiment in trading their junior deckhands is coming to a close. S6, Ep3
Dire Consequences. As injuries pile up, the team push deeper into the Island in search of the Treasure of the Trinity, but a trail of clues leads to confrontation. S1, Ep4
Code To Gold. Josh scours the Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale treasure. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, can he solve the mysterious puzzle? S1, Ep7
Viking Sunstone. Josh Gates travels to the UK and Norway to unlock the secrets of a mystical crystal used by the Vikings. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church. S1, Ep8
Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 1. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep17
Storm Shelter Showdown - Part 2. The Raneys arrive in Missouri to see a family that has just survived a tornado. Living in a crumbling cabin, they also have no clean water source. S1, Ep19
The Blacklighters spot one of the deadliest snakes in the world. The Young Guns take on a dangerous new mine, and the Opal Whisperers hunt for cathedral pattern opal. S5, Ep2
Rory and Oscar are forced to operate their dad's drill rig for the first time. The Tarantos are struck down by sickness, and the Bushmen build a dangerous mine roof. S5, Ep3
Swedish Twins. Josh is forced to take over the Cornelia Marie, whilst Sean gets his first taste of the angry sea. Meanwhile, greenhorns on the Cape Caution are slapped to attention. S12, Ep4
Million-Dollar-Bet. Jake tries a risky short cut with only one engine, and Casey and Josh perform surgery at sea. Can Edgar make his mark as captain with his novice son Eric on deck? S12, Ep5
An American Werewolf. The team respond to reports of a half-man, half-beast in Wisconsin. Attacks and sightings of the Beast of Bray Road have left locals scared for three decades. S2, Ep9
Bigfoot's Doorstep. A catastrophic storm threatens the expedition. Armed with AI technology, the team are ready to meet the elusive cryptid before it's too late. S5, Ep8
In the final week of their season, the Gold Timers are hit by a big storm. The Ferals have a medical emergency, and Linden breaks his gold drought. S6, Ep19
All-Stars: Survivalists Vs. Predator. Two survivalists scavenge a nearby leopard's kill to get food. Matt Wright joins the other survivalists and causes a confrontation. S3, Ep7
All-Stars: Feeding Frenzy. The survivalists embark on several dangerous hunts to secure protein and prepare for their arduous extraction on the horizon. S3, Ep8

Teleshopping.
Drayton Mill Power Plant. The team compete against each other to see who can create the most unique piece from salvaged materials picked up at an abandoned power plant. S10, Ep7
Baltimore Fireboat. In Norfolk, VA, the crew salvages a fireboat from Baltimore. Back at the shop, a local coppersmith fashions unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke. S10, Ep8
Diver's Ed - Part 1. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep13
Diver's Ed - Part 2. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep14
Jarrod Crosbie. Paul Mackie's mine makeover team deal with hardship and heartbreak as they help up-and-coming prospector Jarrod Crosbie overcome a barrage of setbacks. S1, Ep5
The Trainee. Julia must remove a deadly snake from a frightened couple's garage. And Julia and trainee Conway deal with a constrictor snake near a youth centre. S1, Ep8
Bering Sea Swim Club. Skippers Sig and Phil try to re-exchange their deckhands in a high seas transfer. But when both fall into the freezing water it's a race to fish them out. S6, Ep4
Arctic Quest. The Skipper of the Northwestern becomes obsessive in his hunt for the fabled blue King crab. As a storm closes in, his crew start to doubt his sanity. S6, Ep5
Radio Silence. A dangerous run-in leads the team to an astounding new clue, but a communications breakdown leaves them in the dark about an approaching storm. S1, Ep5
Mayan Apocalypse. Josh Gates investigates the fall of the remarkable Mayan empire, unearthing human skulls and ancient sacrificial altars underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico. S1, Ep9
Secrets Of The Nazca. Investigating giant geoglyphs drawn into the earth by ancient Nazca tribes, Josh Gates flies to Peru to study newly-found lines and joins a psychedelic ritual. S1, Ep10
The Hill Of Death. The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. S1, Ep18
High And Dry. Amputee Jeff and wife Carol need a liveable home, water, and a place to grow food. The Raneys build an entire cabin from scratch and harness a natural spring. S2, Ep1
The Tunnel Rats risk their lives to get a massive digger under the ground. Meanwhile, the Blacklighters are amazed to unearth their largest piece of opal. S5, Ep4
The Bushmen's new worker faces a dangerous first day on the job. The Tarantos' overworked excavator grinds to a halt, and the Cheals are hit with more breakdowns. S5, Ep5
100% Injury Rate. The season's worst storm yet hits. Skipper Sean must choose between crab and an old friend. As injuries stack up one deckhand reveals a painful secret in his pants. S12, Ep6
Cold War. With Captain Edgar at the helm, the Northwestern is on the brink of mutiny. Drunk deckhands put the Saga at risk and Captain Johnathan gambles big to end his season. S12, Ep7
The county's air ambulance is called to a pedestrian hit by a car and a critically ill cardiac case. Plus, a woman suffers a freak accident. S2, Ep3
The paramedics treat a cyclist who may be paralysed and a farmer who's fallen off a barn roof. Plus, there's a tricky landing to help a holidaymaker. S2, Ep4
After two workers quit, the Dust Devils are forced to hire an 18-year-old rookie. Plus, the Poseidon Crew hope to end their season with a big nugget. S6, Ep20
